form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 3rd of 10 at Te Rapa on January 30 over 1300m, slow going 4 len behind Mosala carrying 55.5kg at $10.80. Second-up 2nd of 12 at Matamata on February 28 over 1400m, slow going 1.4 len behind Silent Spy with 56kg at $9.10. Brings the right form to the table. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the middle stages.

form.formComment: At debut, made significant ground from the rear of the field 2nd of 11 at Matamata on March 22 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Frozen Fortune with 58kg at $12.30. Will derive great benefit from that outing and looks set to break the maiden status.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 11 at Matamata on March 22 over 1400m, on a slow track; 0.7 len behind Typhoon Lucy carrying 58kg at $25. Has plenty of upside and gets his chance to break through.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 4th of 10 at Waverley on March 18 over 1650m, 4 len behind Belle's Charm with 58kg at $6.30. The run before that 4th of 9 at Te Aroha on February 11 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Shining Pearl carrying 58kg at $7.70. Going well. In the mix.

Before that 4th of 13 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Ballbeena carrying 55kg at $24.90. No threat last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start eased back early on 8th of 11 at Arawa Park on October 12 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 5 len behind Yamato Satona carrying 55kg at $30.10. Went for a spell before returning got back early 6th of 8 at Matamata on March 11 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Rocky Marciano carrying 58kg at $18.90. Must improve sharply to trouble these.

form.formComment: Last start failed to make an impression; second last of 10 at Pukekohe on April 1 over 1600m, on a wet track; 7 len behind Fortune Cookie carrying 55kg at $55.20. The race before that ran last of 9 at Pukekohe on March 13 over 1600m, slow going 13 len behind Written In Heaven with 55kg at $60.10. Hard to get excited about.

form.formComment: At debut, second last of 8 at Hawera on March 25 over 1400m, 4 len behind What Next with 57.5kg at $12.80. Draw helps, but hasn't done anything to date to suggest he can win this.

form.formComment: At the latest run crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 6th of 12 at Pukekohe on April 1 over 1600m, on heavy track; 3 len behind Wolf God with 54kg at $14.40. The start before that 6th of 9 at Hawera on February 27 over 2100m, 3.5 len behind Starpello with 56kg at $5.50. Has ability and can do much better.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Ellerslie January 31 over 1600m, soft track; 8 len behind Burnerphone with 57.5kg at $14.40. On debut fifth of 15 at Te Rapa Mdn-Sw January 16 over 1400m, soft track; 5 len behind Single Red carrying 57kg at $10.40. Likely to need this run.
